stepTitle: Use gradient descent to calculate θ₁⁽¹⁾
stepBody:
Use gradient descent with initial values:
$$	heta_1**{(0)}=0,\;	heta_2**{(0)}=0$$
learning rate $$\alpha=0.1$$, and $$\lambda=0.5$$.
Data:
$$X= egin{pmatrix}1&1\2&0\3&1\end{pmatrix}, \;Y= egin{pmatrix}25\10\5\end{pmatrix}$$
Compute θ₁⁽¹⁾ after one gradient step.
